reference: Hello Doctor, I have a light pain in my upper abdomen with a bloated feeling after eating, and occasional pain in my gut. I experienced some violent pain about a year ago while I was training with an exercise program to strengthen my abdominal muscles. It felt like a tear in my gut while training. I do not know if this is related to what I am experiencing now. I also train with heavy weights. Can you please give me an idea of what is going on and what I should do about this situation?
text: Hello, doctor. I have a light pain in my upper abdomen with a bloated feeling after eating. An occasional pain in my gut. I experienced some violent pain about a year ago while I was training with an exercise program to strengthen my abdominal muscles. It felt like a tear in my gut while training. I do not know if this is related to what I am experiencing now. I also train with heavy weights. Can you please give me an idea of what is going on and what I should do about this situation?
